'''Breac Slaus''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] collector of rare items.

==Biography==
He spent his entire life searching and collecting valuable and rare items throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] Slaus traveled to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]], [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin IV]], where he lived in the [[Mining Outpost (Yavin 4)|Mining Outpost]] for an extended period of [[Time/Legends|time]]. Here, he would occasionally offer rewards to [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] for gathering rare items for him.<ref name="AED" />

==Behind the scenes==
Breac Slaus is one of several collector [[Wikipedia:non-player character|Non-Player Characters]] (NPCs) in the [[Wikipedia:MMORPG|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''. Introduced in the Chapter 7 of November [[2007]], these Non-Player Characters offer several quests that involve collecting items throughout the game world and killing creatures.
